texto: That's what most people don't realize; that's why one out of every two marriages fail. Because people go into them with hearts in their eyes and forever on their lips and no concept whatsoever of what that truly means. Of course it's going to be hard work. Of course you are going to get angry and upset and wonder why, out of everyone in the world entire world, you decided to fall in love with an idiot who farts in his sleep and eats like a pig and can't ever be assed to pick up his own dirty underwear off the fucking floor.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a lielabell: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de limites e escolhas conscientes. O trecho “That's what most people don't realize; that's why one out of every two marriages fail. Because pe…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que amor, cute, vida pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de casamento e trabalho.
